findings.title: Floors, walls and ceilings smooth, easily cleanable, and in good repair (exposed concrete/brick sealed unless dry storage)

data_source_note: VERIFIED 2026-07-11 against the LIVE OnBrand360 portal (fiveguys.steritech.com, Bobby logged in) — dashboard round_id=77575 (Q2 2026), account_id=50, service_id=153. Two widgets agree: AVERAGE SCORE 'Mine' = 99.00 (vs 100.00 prior round) and Score Trend 'Mine' Q2 2026 = 99.00, with 1 non-critical finding (item 236, Food Safety) and 0 critical. This CORRECTS the earlier 98/2-findings value, which came from a stale mid-CAP handoff before item 225 was closed. Before this whole fix the card was a HARDCODED fake 100%/Mar-28/May-28 never wired to real data. LIGHTS-OUT REFRESH STILL BLOCKED: quick-access code OBO8R8R2T expired (401). The logged-in widget API (/api/widgets_data/*) requires a per-session bearer token that expires and sits behind a login (not lights-out). Durable fix: (a) get a NEW quick-access code from the Steritech/OnBrand360 rep and update QUICK_ACCESS_CODE in scraper/scrape_steritech.py, or (b) add STERITECH_PASSWORD (rcline@estep-co.com) as a GitHub Actions secret and run scrape_steritech.py --full-history.
